goal: Verify that FileEasy has a usable local build environment for Android and web validation, identify concrete environment blockers, and produce a verification summary that can unblock end-to-end integration testing.
nonGoals: Do not implement new product features.
Do not modify PRD or design documents.
Do not silently change product code unless a PM-approved blocker fix is explicitly requested.

acceptanceChecks.text: The task should confirm whether Android FileEasy compile verification can run locally, and if not, identify the exact environment blocker with concrete evidence.
The task should verify the web-admin build path and report whether it is stable enough for integration testing.
The final report should clearly separate environment problems from product-code problems.

handoffQuestions: List only environment blockers that require PM or user action before end-to-end integration validation.
